title: Workflow Variable
description: Definition of a workflow variable. Valid properties: name, value, fromConfig, expression.

value.description: Static variable value or template expression

expression.description: NCalc expression to evaluate at runtime. Has access to all previously resolved variables. Mutually exclusive with value and fromConfig.

oneOf.description: Configuration key to load value from

key.description: Optional key within configuration. If omitted, the variable receives the whole config object with organizationConfigId injected alongside custom values.

fromConfig.description: Load value from organization configuration. When a full config is loaded without a key, the runtime injects organizationConfigId into the returned object; keyed lookups return only the keyed value.
